title: Change Invalidation Policy Editor
description: Inline editor for change **invalidation policy** on Overview. Updates drift behaviour for future edits; does not invalidate approvals by itself (`core:edit-change`).
context: Inline editor for change **invalidation policy** on Overview. Updates drift behaviour for future edits; does not invalidate approvals by itself (`core:edit-change`).

rules.requirement: select policy and save when dirty
rules: MUST offer `none`, `surgical`, `downstream`, `global` (default display `downstream` when DTO omits field). **Save** (`studio-change-invalidation-policy-save`) MUST call `patchChange({ invalidationPolicy })`.
MUST state that the policy affects future drift invalidation only, not current approvals.

scenarios.requirement: select policy and save when dirty
scenarios.name: Save sends invalidationPolicy
given: user selected surgical differing from saved

scenarios.name: Copy visible
then: helper text mentions future drift only
